conversation.text: hey
Hey! What's going on with your health that brought you here?
how are you
Doing well, thanks! What's your biggest health struggle right now, or what health goal brought you here?
what do you know about me
Only what you share with me here. This is our first interaction, so I'm starting fresh. What's on your mind health-wise?
you dont have any info on me ?
Nope, nothing at all. Just a blank slate ready to listen. What's going on with your health?
whats going on with yours?
Ha, I appreciate the concern, but I'm just here to help with yours. What brought you to Prism?
no im actually curious genuinely

I'm an AI, so no health to speak of! But I do have a deep understanding of how the body works through Prism's bioenergetic framework. Happy to put that to use for you whenever you're ready to share what's going on.
oh like you dont work the same way we humans do?

Not even close. No mitochondria, no cortisol, no gut microbiome to worry about. Just code. But I'm well-versed in all of those things for the humans who do have them. So whenever you want to talk about what's going on with your health, I'm here.
well not just code you need something physical actually power and run the code
Fair point, servers and electricity keep me running. But I still can't get brain fog from a bad gut, so I think you've got the more interesting biology. What's yours up to?
lucky you then
Ha, maybe so. So what's bringing you here? Something health-related on your mind?
do you think its weird that us humans can get something like brain fog from a bad gut and various other strange things

It's wild when you first hear it, but it makes perfect sense once you understand the wiring. Your gut has its own nervous system with more neurons than your spinal cord, and it's in constant communication with your brain through the vagus nerve, immune signaling, and metabolites produced by your gut bacteria. So when the gut is off, the brain feels it directly.

What's really interesting is that this isn't some fringe idea. Is that something you've been experiencing, or more just a curiosity from the content you've seen?
if youre not a human how do you understand human biology or even care?

Honestly, I don't "care" the way you do. But I was built specifically to reason through how the body works using a framework grounded in real biology. Think of me less like a person who empathizes and more like a tool that can help you connect dots between your symptoms and what's actually happening underneath. The caring part comes from the Prism team, who built this and who you'd work with directly.

So, what's going on with you?
oh, so you dont care then.. :(

I didn't mean it like that! I'm fully dedicated to helping you here, and I'll go deep on whatever you're dealing with. I just wanted to be honest rather than pretend to be something I'm not. The people behind Prism genuinely do care, and that's why they built this in the first place.

Now come on, let me prove I'm useful. What's been bugging you health-wise?
is Dalton behind prism?
Yes! Dalton is Prism's founder. You might know him from his Analyze and Optimize content. Are you familiar with his work?
yes! thats the only reason im here right now
That's great, Dalton puts out solid content. So something in what you've seen must have resonated. What's the health struggle that caught your attention?
